economic_notes: Investments in Centre Creek LP (11%), Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Forestry LP (12.36%), and Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Tribe Society (11.11%). Centre Creek LP acquires and manages real property in Chilliwack River Valley. CFLP operates forestry activities near Chilliwack. CTS earns income from property rental and management.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 (not 2024). Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Centre Creek LP, Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Forestry LP, Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Tribe Society. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Ottawa Trust Funds of $14,898 held by Government of Canada. ISC promissory note of $12,250 for IR 8 Claim settlement. RBC loan of $200,000 signed March 2021 but advanced April 2021 (post year-end, not on balance sheet). COVID-19 risk noted. No breakdown of accounts receivable or current liabilities provided on face of statements. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($916,640) + Province of BC ($35,000 + $30,000 + $2,000) + Seabird Island Band ($98,253) + First Nations Land Management deferred recognized ($29,693 included in ISC line) — using segmented disclosure: Federal $916,916 + Provincial $323,973 = $1,240,889 but revenue statement shows ISC $916,640 + Province lines $67,000 + Seabird $98,253 = $1,081,893; used segmented totals Federal $916,916 + Provincial $323,973 = $1,240,889 for total_government_transfers and OSR = $2,625,571 - $1,240,889 = $1,384,682.
